data.body: S1 (843b) CLOSED — completion-verifier attestation earned (close would have blocked on FAIL). S1 done end-to-end: impl + live cutover verified + change #582 (LLM+1,Verified+1) + ticket closed with plan-review + completion-verifier attestations. S2 (0ee8) unblocked. S2a/b/c changes (#583/#584/#585) re-pushed with the _fakes rename fix; CI re-running; will close S2 tree bottom-up after Verified+1.
